seo.title: Nurdaulet - Software Engineer
seo.description: My personal portfolio is a showcase of my projects, skills, and experience as a software engineer specializing in front-end development using React and TypeScript.

2004.desc: I was born 1 of January 2004 in Kentau, Kazakhstan. I knew I am connected with engineering and technology things, but I don't expect choice of my future profession will be related to software development.
2004.title: The Beginning

2016.desc: In 2016 I entered Nazarbayev Intellectual School in Shymkent. It was a great experience for me, because I had an opportunity to learn programming and other technical subjects.
2016.title: School - NIS

2022.desc: In 2022 I entered Astana IT University. I chose Software Engineering as my major, because I wanted to learn more about software development and become a developer.
2022.title: University - AITU

2023.desc: After internship at outsourcing company, I got an offer to work as a frontend developer at ZIZ INC. I worked on various projects, including e-commerce and corporate websites. Of course, working with other developers and learning from them was a great experience for me
2023.title: First Career Step - ZIZ INC.

Today.desc: I am currently working as a middle frontend developer at LLP Digital Bridge, where I continue to grow my skills and contribute to exciting projects.
Today.title: Now - LLP Digital Bridge

seo.title: About - Nurdaulet
seo.description: Learn more about Nurdaulet Orynbassarov — a frontend developer.
